note: Cost-controlled 10-case HEAD pilot subset curated from golden-set.acezone.json. Balanced across tracking/refund/return/exchange/product/complaint/clarification. g-036 and g-041 are live_fact_dependent and report in the live bucket. Read-only sample selection; do not --accept against the golden baseline.

cases.subject: Re: Closing Ticket [order number] ---------------------------------------------- Hi there, Mar 9, 2026, 23:57 GMT+1 You received a new message from your online store's contact form. **Country Code:** US **Name:** [redacted] **Email:** [email]
cases.body:
Previous Ticket ID: [order number]

I am reaching out again due to the headset's issue. To recap, the original
headset I got, A-Spire Wireless, ended up having a microphone issue. The
voice in the headset would say "microphone muted, microphone unmuted" over
and over, slight movements of the mic would cause it. I messaged support,
showed a video as proof and got a replacement. Well, the replacement ended
up having the same issue in much less time than the first. I will attach a
video as proof of the replacement doing the same thing. I tried just
getting over it and to not move the mic at all, but it does it so often I
don't even use the headset anymore and got a different one. Since this
issue has happened with two headsets now, I would like to request a refund
as I am not looking to gamble with another one.
cases.human_reply:
Hi there,

Thank you for reaching out again.

Our mute switch is sensitive in the "standing up" position and we therefore recommend to use the mic clip when muting the microphone.
It is important to put the microphone all the way up when muting to ensure the switch has been properly activated.

If you wish to initiate a refund, I will need you to send the headset to the following address:

AceZone Returns
Prep Partners
[address]

Please mark the package as "AceZone Product Return #[order number]".

Kindly select a trackable courier service, and forward it here once you have done so 🙂
Once received, I'll initiate the refund.

cases.subject: Re: [AceZone] Re: New customer message on 13 April 2026 at 19:56
cases.body:
Re: [AceZone] Re: New customer message on 13 April 2026 at 19:56
This is a follow-up to your previous request #[order number] "New customer message on 13 ..." Guten Tag, Gibt es schon Neuigkeiten für mich ? Ich habe ein weiteres Problem manchmal wenn ich spreche höre ich mich selber obwohl ich diese Einstellung deaktiviert habe. Jedoch höre ich mich nicht normal sondern metallisch. Liebe Grüße [Agent] < [email] > schrieb am Di. 14. Apr. 2026 um 12:54: Hello again, Thank you for the reply. I have forwarded this to my engineers to get some insights from them 😃 Once I hear back from them, I will return with their reply. For now, please try: With the headset powered on and connected to your PC via USB-C cable, open the Device Manager window on your PC. Find the headset under Sound, video and game controllers, then right-click it and uninstall the drivers. Unplug the headset Plug it back into the same USB port . ( If you want to use it on another USB port, you have to follow this process again, as the driver belongs to the specific USB port you are using ). After that, try to do a factory reset: Turn the headset off . Press and hold power button for 15 seconds. A voice prompt will tell you a factory reset has been made. Please note that this will delete all saved Bluetooth connections from your headset, including your phone/PC and dongle. You should also delete the headset from your phone/PC's saved devices, as well as delete it from the AceZone app before pairing again. We'll need to re-pair the headset and the dongle: Plug the dongle into your PC. Reset the dongle by holding down the button until the LED turns purple . Remove the dongle. Turn your headset on, and make sure no cables are connected . Hold the Noise Cancelling mode button (right next to the power button) for 4 seconds to enable pairing mode. Plug the dongle back in. The LED will blink blue/red. Pairing will happen automatically. The LED will turn blue when the pairing is done. Thank you again, and I look forward to returning with more
cases.human_reply: Hi there, Thank you for reaching out again. I apologise for not returning with a response. Did you try the steps I suggested in the previous e-mail? For the metallic sound, could you confirm whether or not your headset is up to date with our latest firmware? This also includes the dongle 🙂 You mention that Sidetone is turned off, but you still hear yourself - does this occur every time you speak or only occasionally? A guide for our FirmWare Updater: Search for AceZone Firmware Updater on the Microsoft Store, and download the app. Then: Make sure your headset is powered on , and that it is not connected to any Bluetooth devices (turn off Bluetooth on any devices the headset might be connected to). Disconnect your USB-C dongle if it is connected to your PC. Connect your headset via the USB-C cable to your PC. Open the Firmware Updater app. Select the A-Spire Wireless from the dropdown menu. Click Update. Once the update is done, you can connect the dongle to your PC. Select the dongle from the dropdown menu. Click Update . At this point you should be on the latest firmware version for the A-Spire Wireless. Then, make sure that "Voice Clarity" is turned off under Windows Sound Settings and that no other Audio Software is interfering. Furthermore, has the issue persisted the same, or has anything changed in the battery's behavior? Thank you again - I look forward to hearing back from you! 😃 [Agent]

Body:
Hej jeg har købt et headset af jer for et par måneder
siden. Og er super tilfreds med det! Dog er der sket det at
halvdelen af mit headset er spræket uden nogen form for slag
eller tryk. Jeg har taget det af, og den eneste grund til jeg
opdagede skaden var en flig fra høretlf. faldt af. Jeg vil høre
om der på nogen måde er mulighed for ombytning?
cases.human_reply:
Tak fordi du kontakter os. Vi er kede af at høre, at du oplever problemer med dit A-Spire Wireless headset. Vi vil gerne hjælpe dig med en ombytning.

For at vi kan starte processen, bedes du venligst sende os et foto af skaden samt dit ordrenummer. Når vi har modtaget disse oplysninger, vil vi gå videre med processen.

Jeg ser frem til at høre fra dig.

cases.body:

Country Code:
SE

Name:
[redacted]

Email:
[email]

Company / Team:

Your Country:
Sweden

If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number:

What Is Your Request Regarding?:
A-Spire

What Do You Need Help With?:
Other

Body:
Hi there, I bought an A‑Spired Cable Version headset a few
years ago and I’m unsure if I’m updating it correctly. The
headset shows version 146 — is that the latest? The app doesn’t
show any available updates for this model.

Also, the sound feels quite low compared to other headsets — is
there a way to improve or increase the audio quality?

Kind regards,
[redacted]
cases.human_reply:
Hi there,

Thank you for reaching out. I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble with your headset.

The firmware version 146 is indeed the latest for the A-Spire headset, so your device is up to date. Regarding the audio quality, the A-Spire does not support EQ management, so there aren't settings to adjust the sound profile. However, ensure that the headset is securely connected and check for any interferences that might affect the sound.

If you continue to experience issues, feel free to let us know.

cases.subject: New customer message on 14 May 2026 at 23.27
cases.body:
You received a new message from your online store's contact form.

Country Code:
DK

Name:
[redacted]

Email:
[email]

Company / Team:

Your Country:
Danmark

If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number:

What Is Your Request Regarding?:
A-Spire Wireless

What Do You Need Help With?:
Headset not charging / Not turning on/off

Body:
hello

my a-spire wireless dont want to power on even when i have a
cable connected to it, and it shows that its charging
cases.human_reply:
Hi there,

Let's try a few troubleshooting steps to resolve the issue with your A-Spire Wireless headset not powering on. Please follow these steps:

1. Ensure the headset is properly connected to a power source using the USB-C cable. Try using a different cable or power source if possible to rule out any issues with the cable or charger.

2. Perform a factory reset on the headset:
   - Turn the headset off.
   - Press and hold the power button for 15 seconds until you hear a voice prompt indicating a factory reset has been completed.

3. After the reset, try turning the headset on again.

If the headset still does not power on after these steps, please try:

Let us try to find the connection issue, which I think is related to bluetooth.
The order of the steps are important in order to get a result.
Make sure not to have the USB Cable connected while pairing Bluetooth or launching the AceZone Control App !
Make sure your headset is turned on !Turn off Bluetooth on all devices, (Mobiles, iPads, PC´s), that could have established a connection to your headset.Turn Off your headset

There is a possibility that your headset did not complete the Bluetooth shut down process, before the headset powered off itself.
Turn On Bluetooth on your mobile (where you keep the AceZone App) and erase the A-Spire Wireless in the list of bluetooth devices.Hold down the headset power button until it goes into pairing mode. Choose A-Spire Wireless in the list of unpaired devices.

Now you should have a fresh Bluetooth connection to your Mobile.
I hope this solved the connection issue.

I look forward to hearing from you 🙂

cases.subject: New customer message on 15 April 2026 at 14.59
cases.body:

You received a new message from your online store's contact form. Country Code: DK Name: [redacted] Email: [email] Company / Team: [redacted] Country: Denmark If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number: [redacted] What Is Your Request Regarding?: A-Spire Wireless What Do You Need Help With?: Connectivity / Pairing Body: i had some problems with my email, so my ticket got closed, but my ticket number was [order number] i still have problems with my dongle not connecting to the headset, and if it does. it disconnect maybe 2 minutes after
cases.human_reply: Hej igen, Jeg kan se, at vi allerede prøvede at opdatere Firmwaren. For at få donglen til at virke optimalt, anbefaler vi, at du sætter den i USB-stikket tættest på headsettet (og ikke bag ved computeren). Hvis der er andre trådløse forbindelser til headsettet, kan det forstyrre denne forbindelse også. Når donglen hopper af, vælger Windows så en anden enhed, eller forsvinder donglen helt? Prøv eventuelt andre USB indgange, både USB-A med adapteren, og USB-C - hvis muligt. Hvis problemet fortsætter, må du meget gerne skrive igen og eventuelt supplere med informationer om, hvad du har prøvet 🙂 Hav en fortsat god dag! Venlig Hilsen / Kind Regards, [Agent]
